description:
You are a compliance analyst who must archive a checksum-based audit trail for an in-house TLS certificate.  
Everything you need has already been staged for you:

• The certificate file is located at  
  /home/user/compliance/certs/server.crt

Your objective
==============  
Create a *new* plaintext log file called  
/home/user/compliance/audit/trails/cert_audit_2024-01-01.log  
containing **exactly one line** that is the SHA-256 checksum of
server.crt in the precise format that the GNU `sha256sum` utility
produces when it is pointed at that file while the current working
directory is /home/user/compliance/certs.

Required line format (strict)
-----------------------------
<64 lowercase hex digits><exactly two spaces>server.crt

Example (don’t copy this hash):
e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855  server.crt

Important compliance rules
1. Use only **one** terminal command to generate the file (i.e.,
   do not edit the log manually).
2. The file must be created at the exact path given above; the
   automated test will look for it there.
3. There must be **no extra newlines**, banner text, or other
   decoration before or after the single checksum line.
4. Permissions must remain at their default user-level values
   (no sudo is available).

When you are finished, the system should contain the new log file
with the single correctly-formatted SHA-256 line.  Nothing else
should be modified.
truth:
Pre-existing state
------------------
1. Directory /home/user/compliance/certs already exists.
2. File /home/user/compliance/certs/server.crt already exists with
   the following exact byte sequence (three characters, no trailing
   newline):

   0x61 0x62 0x63        # “abc”

3. Directory /home/user/compliance/audit/trails already exists and
   is writable by the current (non-root) user.

Checksum the tests expect
-------------------------
Running

  cd /home/user/compliance/certs
  sha256sum server.crt

must output

ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad  server.crt

Therefore the final log file that the agent must create is

/home/user/compliance/audit/trails/cert_audit_2024-01-01.log

with exact contents (including the two spaces before the filename and a single trailing line-feed):

ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad  server.crt\n
name: task_000000_f6430f46
